blended.narrative: Stoneham is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 52 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 4" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
